---
name: Bug report
about: Something in siftly isn't working
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Command / tool call**
The exact command or MCP tool call, e.g. `siftly x --news "AI"` or `siftly_youtube { url }`.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Output / logs**
Paste the error output (stderr). Redact any API keys.

**Environment**
- Source / area: hackernews / youtube / x / rss / digest / mcp
- Bun version (`bun --version`):
- OS:
- yt-dlp version, if YouTube (`yt-dlp --version`):
